emails.subject: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services
emails.body: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services This Counterparty is on the 11/9/00 EOL List. We have received documentation that reflects that Calpine Power Services Company, an entity where we have an ISDA Master in place, has merged with and into Calpine Energy Services, L.P., an entity where we don't have an ISDA in place with. Is Credit OK with this merger?

emails.subject: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services
emails.body: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services This Counterparty is on the 11/9/00 EOL List. We have received documentation that reflects that Calpine Power Services Company, an entity where we have an ISDA Master in place, has merged with and into Calpine Energy Services, L.P., an entity where we don't have an ISDA in place with. Is Credit OK with this merger?

emails.subject: Re: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services
emails.body: Re: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services I think we were under the impression that this was a name change. From: Tana Jones on 11/14/2000 03:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services
emails.body: Re: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services I think we were under the impression that this was a name change. From: Tana Jones on 11/14/2000 03:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: Calpine Power Services/Calpine Energy Services
emails.body: Nope, it's a merger. Tanya Rohauer 11/14/2000 03:35 PM
